Class DictionaryBuilder

java.lang.Object
DictionaryBuilder
public class DictionaryBuilder extends Object
Class to create a generic linked list based Dictionary ADT

    Modifier and Type
    Field

    table
     

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DictionaryBuilder()
    Default constructor for DictionaryBuilder.
    DictionaryBuilder(int estimatedEntries)
    Constructs a DictionaryBuilder with a table size optimized for the estimated number of entries using a 0.6 load factor and a 4k+3 prime number.
    DictionaryBuilder(String filename)
    Constructs a DictionaryBuilder by reading words from a specified file.

    Gets the current size of the hash table.

    Checks if a number is prime.

    • table

      private GenericLinkedList<entry>[] table

      private int allWords

  • Constructor Details

    • DictionaryBuilder

      public DictionaryBuilder()
      Default constructor for DictionaryBuilder.

    • DictionaryBuilder

      public DictionaryBuilder(int estimatedEntries)
      Constructs a DictionaryBuilder with a table size optimized for the estimated number of entries using a 0.6 load factor and a 4k+3 prime number.
      Parameters:
      estimatedEntries - The expected number of unique words to be stored.

    • DictionaryBuilder

      public DictionaryBuilder(String filename) throws FileNotFoundException
      Constructs a DictionaryBuilder by reading words from a specified file.
      Parameters:
      filename - the name of the file to be read
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - If the specified file does not exist.

  • Method Details

    • find4k3PrimeNum

      private static int find4k3PrimeNum(int num)
      Finds a prime number that works with 4k3
      Parameters:
      num - The starting integer to check.
      Returns:
      An integer that is prime and fits the 4k+3 criteria.

    • isPrime

      private static boolean isPrime(int n)
      Checks if a number is prime.
      Parameters:
      n - The integer to check.
      Returns:
      true if the number is prime, false otherwise.

    • addWord

      public void addWord(String word)
      Adds a word to the dictionary. Increases counter if it's a repeat word.
      Parameters:
      word - The word to be added.

    • searchWord

      public boolean searchWord(String word)
      Searches for a word in the hash table.
      Parameters:
      word - The word to search for.
      Returns:
      true if the word exists in the dictionary, false otherwise.

    • getFrequency

      public int getFrequency(String word)
      Returns the number of repeats of a word
      Parameters:
      word - The word to check.
      Returns:
      The number of times the word has been added.

    • removeWord

      public void removeWord(String word) throws DictionaryEntryNotFoundException
      Removes a word entry from the dictionary
      Parameters:
      word - The word to be removed.
      Throws:
      DictionaryEntryNotFoundException - If the word is not found in the table.

    • getAllWords

      public ArrayList<String> getAllWords()
      Returns an alphabetically sorted list of all the different words
      Returns:
      An ArrayList containing all unique words in alphabetical order.

    • getDiffWords

      public int getDiffWords()
      Gets the count of unique words in the dictionary.
      Returns:
      The number of distinct entries.

    • getNumAllWords

      public int getNumAllWords()
      Gets the total count of words processed, including duplicates.
      Returns:
      The sum of all word frequencies.

    • getSize

      public int getSize()
      Gets the current size of the hash table.
      Returns:
      The number of buckets in the table.
